title: Nilpotent centres via inverse integrating factors
author_string: ALGABA, ANTONIO, GARCÍA, CRISTÓBAL, GINÉ, JAUME
abstract: In this paper, we are interested in the nilpotent centre problem of planar analytic monodromic vector fields. It is known that the formal integrability is not enough to characterize such centres. More general objects are considered as the formal inverse integrating factors. However, the existence of a formal inverse integrating factor is not sufficient to describe all the nilpotent centres. For the family studied in this paper, it is enough.
